curation.synopsis: Every time Saint Celestine dies, she falls into a realm of torment and must fight her way back to the Emperor's wars. This short novel braids that inner trial with a desperate battle in Imperium Nihilus, where Celestine manifests beside Sisters of Battle, Astra Militarum soldiers and fanatical civilians beneath the Noctis Aeterna. The outer story is last-stand war; the inner one asks what centuries of resurrection do to faith when the reward for dying is only more dying. A saint's legend retold as philosophical horror.

flags.reason: Lexicanum + Track-of-Words + Black Library product page consistently characterise *Celestine* as a 'short novel' / novella-length release (closer to the *Assassinorum: Execution Force* register from ssot-w40k-009 than a standard novel). Valid `book_format` enum has `novella` but no `short_novel`.
